Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi used by org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
    Class
    Description
    JsonApiDocument
    Represents the top-level JSON:API document as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Document Structure.
    JsonApiError
    Represents a JSON:API Error Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Error Objects.
    JsonApiErrorSource
    Represents the source sub-object of a JSON:API Error Object.
    JsonApiLink
    Represents a JSON:API Link Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Links.
    JsonApiRelationship
    Represents a JSON:API Relationship Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Relationships.
    JsonApiResource
    Represents a JSON:API Resource Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Resource Objects.
    JsonApiResourceIdentifier
    Represents a JSON:API Resource Identifier Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Resource Identifier Objects.
    JsonApiVersion
    Represents the JSON:API top-level jsonapi member.
